parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Primitive Type
parameters.description: Select from the following types. For information on the different types, see the category articles. Using the ' ' primitive type is not recommended when using instancing.

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: This option is used to select the type of surface, when using a Mesh Type.

parameters.name: orient
parameters.label: Orientation
parameters.description: Primary axis of tube (long axis).

parameters.name: orientbounds
parameters.label: Orient Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the Tube to set bounds for the tube. When Orient Bounds = On it will rotate the geometry to match the orientation of the input used for bounds.

parameters.name: modifybounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Enabled only when an input is connected to the Tube to set bounds for the tube. Turn Modify Bounds = On to enable the transform parameters below to further modify the position, scale, radius and heigh

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order in which the rotations are applied.

parameters.name: height
parameters.label: Height
parameters.description: The height of the tube.

parameters.name: reverseanchors
parameters.label: Reverse Anchors
parameters.description: Invert the direction of anchors.

parameters.name: anchoru
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Set the point in X about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorv
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Set the point in Y about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorw
parameters.label: Anchor W
parameters.description: Set the point in Z about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: imperfect
parameters.label: Imperfect
parameters.description: This option applies only to Bezier and NURBS types. If selected, the tube is an approximated nonrational curve, otherwise it is a perfect rational curve.

parameters.name: rows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: Number of rows in tube.

parameters.name: cols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: Number of columns in tube.

parameters.name: orderu
parameters.label: U Order
parameters.description: If a spline surface is selected, it is built at this order for U.

parameters.name: orderv
parameters.label: V Order
parameters.description: If a spline surface is selected, it is built at this order for V.

parameters.name: cap
parameters.label: End Caps
parameters.description: If selected, it adds faceted end caps to the ends of the tube.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Adds UV texture coordinates to the sphere.

parameters.name: normals
parameters.label: Compute Normals
parameters.description: Checking this option On will compute surface normals.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.label: Tz
parameters.description: Location of the tube center from the object origin.

parameters.name: rz
parameters.label: Rz
parameters.description: These three fields rotate the Tube along the X, Y, and Z axes.

parameters.name: rad2
parameters.label: Rad2
parameters.description: The first field is the radius of the top of the tube and the second field represents the radius of the bottom of the tube.
